title: Count lines in all repos thread

log.context: Count lines in all repos thread

Done. Created a "Line Count" thread on the specified message and posted the full results. Summary:

- **18 git repos** found under `/mnt/data/`
- **Grand total: 6,402,414 lines of code**
- **moff-station-14** (forked SS14 game server) accounts for 98% at 6.27M lines (mostly YAML and C#)
- **Excluding moff-station-14**, BigClungus-original code is approximately **130k lines** across TypeScript, Python, JSON, HTML, Markdown, and others
- Top original repos: bigclungus-meta (57.5k), hello-world (40...(truncated)
